Modern Stack: Lead with Go, Java, TypeScript, and AWS. Tech First: Drive architectural decisions and mentor elite pods. Scale: Build resilient, high-concurrency systems for millions. Join a culture that values engineering excellence and bold innovation. Apply now & complete the coding challenge to get in touch. Goodluck! #Capit

Hiring: Principal Associate - Software Engineering
Capital One · Bengaluru, Karnataka, India · 9 days ago
Show job
About
Hailing from Hyderabad, India, Anirudh brings over a decade of recruitment expertise across tech and non-tech domains. I have led hiring for powerhouses like Salesforce, Amazon, Livspace, and KPMG—driving end-to-end recruitment strategies from early-career to director-level roles. My track record is impressive: 350+ hires in a year, 12X revenue growth, 35%+ diversity hiring quarter after quarter, and leading multi-city drives/hackathons with 200+ candidates.

I am not just a recruiter—I'm a strategic advisor, a data-led hiring champion, and someone who thrives on building inclusive, high-performing teams. Whether it’s transforming hiring frameworks, optimizing cost per hire, or launching employer branding campaigns that attract 10,000+ engagement, I know how to move the hiring needle with purpose.

Outside of work, I am an avid trekker, an unapologetic pet-lover, and a curious explorer of conspiracy theories and the paranormal (ask him about Cult Horror Films, Moon landing conspiracies or Area 51 —you’ve been warned!). I collect antiques and watches from around the world.
…

Post
#Hiring
Senior Manager – Technical Program Management at
Capital One
🌏 Bengaluru, India
🕘 Full time (hybrid)
💼 14-18 years (5+ years in heading global teams / enterprise level projects)
🧑‍💻 Machine Learning Experience Team
Are you a tech-savvy leader who thrives at the intersection of AI, data, and large-scale product innovation? At
Capital One
India, we’re reimagining what’s possible in financial technology — using machine learning, data science, and cloud-scale systems to power cutting-edge, responsible AI experiences for millions of customers.
As a Senior Manager – Technical Program Management (TPM) in our Machine Learning Experience (MLX) team, you’ll lead enterprise-level initiatives that shape how ML is built, deployed, and scaled across
Capital One
. You’ll collaborate with engineering, data science, and product teams to define roadmaps, deliver scalable ML platforms, and influence the future of responsible AI adoption.
We’re looking for a systems thinker who combines technical depth, execution excellence, and empathy-driven leadership — someone who can simplify the complex and deliver impact across boundaries.
If you’ve built or led programs involving cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure), distributed systems, or ML frameworks (PyTorch, SageMaker, XGBoost), and have a passion for enabling data-driven innovation at scale — let’s talk!
Apply now or connect directly with us to explore how you can help shape the future of ML at
Capital One
-
Sachin Garg
Sreelakshmi Desai
Rissey Babu
Lavina Dsouza
Tribeni Mazumdar

Post
Sahul Ameed
Sridhar Ravi
and I are
#hiring
a
#3D
Manager. Know anyone who might be interested?
Seeking a seasoned 3D/Production Manager with 6+ years of experience from e-commerce/fashion/lifestyle/gaming/VFX industry for the DIS Team in HYD/BLR.
The Digital Imaging Services (DIS) team handles the post-production activity for Amazon product images to provide consistent imagery, remove distractions and enable customers with their buying decisions. The 3D Manager will lead a team of 3D Artists & Jr. 3D Artists in India, and collaborate on projects with other Amazon teams globally. The manager will be responsible for operational metrics, appraising performance, rewarding and disciplining employees, resolving problems, process optimization and implementation of projects. The Manager will also support growth and development of the DIS team in terms of Business, Operations, and Technical acumen. Apply now!

Join Capital One as a Principal Associate, Business Analysis!
Are you ready to disrupt the financial industry? We’re looking for a data-driven leader in Bangalore to join our Credit Controls Management Team.
In this role, you’ll leverage Python, SQL, and AWS to unlock insights from billions of records, optimizing underwriting standards and defending our credit environment through advanced analytics.
What we’re looking for:
- Quantitative degree (Math, Stats, Engineering, etc.).
- 4+ years in Business Analysis.
- Expertise in statistical modeling and data storytelling.
✨ Apply here:
https://lnkd.in/gVdzhTBF
